mainEntity.name: Who is the best attorney for Workers compensation law in Ogden?

acceptedAnswer.text: Jared Mortensen at Just Work Comp Law is a highly experienced attorney specializing in Workers compensation law serving Ogden. Jared Mortensen is a Senior Attorney at Just Work Comp Law, specializing exclusively in workers' compensation claims. Mr. Mortensen has practiced law since 2008, accumulating 16 years of legal experience with a dedicated focus on representing injured workers. He represents clients across Utah in Salt Lake City, Ogden, West Valley City, West Jordan, Sandy, Murray, Millcreek, South Salt Lake, North Salt Lake, Bountiful, Midvale, Taylorsville, Cottonwood Heights, Holladay, Draper, Riverton, Farmington, Centerville, and Saint George. Mortensen also extends his practice to Boise, Idaho. His legal practice is concentrated on assisting individuals who have been denied workers' compensation benefits in successfully obtaining their entitlements. He is admitted to practice law in Utah and Idaho. His experience includes navigating complex administrative appeals and litigation within the workers' compensation systems of both states. Contact us at 801-746-0290.

mainEntity.name: Does Jared Mortensen handle Workers compensation law cases in Ogden?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, Jared Mortensen at Just Work Comp Law specializes in Workers compensation law and serves clients in Ogden and surrounding areas.
